name: Sectioned Nav
summary: Sectioned-disclosure navigation panel: collapsible section heads (W3C APG Disclosure Navigation) over link lists — the sectioned counterpart of the flat nav-list block. Click toggles a section, Escape collapses the focused one, and the active link carries aria-current. Built for the #870 must-build set so the #865 WE-docs chrome dogfood can mount it in-document (mode C).

disclosureNavigation.pattern: Disclosure Navigation Menu — section heads expose aria-expanded + aria-controls over collapsible link lists
disclosureNavigation.adoption: Each section head is a button with aria-expanded/aria-controls; Escape collapses the focused section

ariaCurrent.pattern: aria-current='page' marks the link for the current page
ariaCurrent.adoption: The current link in a section carries aria-current='page'
